entries.question: cadence trigger policy で今の状態は何か
entries.answer: Current cadence surfaces are present; no immediate follow-through is required.
entries.expectation_state: trigger policy distinguishes idle, single-action, and batched follow-through states
entries.scale_direction: focus next on autonomous invocation timing rather than more policy vocabulary

entries.question: framework self-audit で次に残る gap は何か
entries.answer: batched follow-through and autonomous invocation timing are still not runtime-executed
entries.expectation_state: single-action cadence follow-through is now runtime-backed for retire-candidate review
entries.mismatch_state: batched follow-through and autonomous invocation timing are still not runtime-executed
entries.scale_direction: keep TASK-004 focused on bundled follow-through execution and autonomous cadence invocation timing

entries.question: framework self-audit で次に残る gap は何か
entries.answer: skill, capability, resource, and policy are now drafted in docs and schemas, but they are not yet integrated into the canonical organization/runtime surfaces.
entries.expectation_state: AOF now has a clear comparative analysis and release boundary for v2.2, but the capability layer is still only partially represented.
entries.mismatch_state: skill, capability, resource, and policy are now drafted in docs and schemas, but they are not yet integrated into the canonical organization/runtime surfaces.
entries.scale_direction: define the first integration boundary between organization manifests and capability-layer artifacts
